case_title: MACDONALD, NORMAN J. VS GARCIA, CECILIO

docket_entries.description: CIVIL SUBPENAS ISSUED AND MAILED TO PLTFF. PER HIS WRITTEN REQUEST;
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, CECILIO
ORDER GRANTING ORDER OF EXAMINATION HEARING BE CONTINUED TO 10/28/99 --PER--COMMISSIONER JULIAN T. LASTOWSKI, FILED.
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF OCT-28-1999, DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, CECILIO
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-11-1998, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-25-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
INFO RE COLLECTION OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO PLTFF. WRITTEN REQUEST IN FILE
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: MAR-28-1999 AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, CECILIO
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF JUL-15-1999, CONTINUED FROM JUL-15-1999 TO SEP-30-1999 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506 AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, CECILIO
NOTICE LETTER & CERTIFICATION OF SERVICE BY MAIL TO DEFT. CECILIO GARCIA, PER NORA SHEA.
COPIES OF ORDER AND NOTICE OF CONTINUANCE, AND CERTIFICATION OF SERVICE BY MAIL SENT TO ALL PARTIES.
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF JUN-17-1999, NO APPEARANCE, CONTINUED FOR LETTER FROM JUN-17-1999 TO JUL-15-1999 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506 AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, CECILIO
OEX DISCHARGED AS TO: GARCIA, CECILIO
CORRESPONDENCE FROM PLTF. REC'D, REQUESTING A NEW OEX HEARING; DENIED; 120 DAYS HAD NOT PASSED PER LOCAL RULE 8.15 (J).
LETTER TO PLTF. OF NORA SHEA; OEX HEARING WILL BE RESCHEDULED PER JUDGE CHIANTELLI'S INTRUCTIONS.
CORRESPONDENCE FROM PLAINTIFF RE: UNABLE TO SERVE OEX - FILED;
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, CECILIO HEARING SET FOR MAR-29-1999 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PLAINTIFF AND DEFT. BOTH APPEARED ON OEX, HEARING; OEX AS TO DEFT. GARCIA, CECILIO DISCHARGED IN COURT PER LOCAL RULES 8.15 (J).
PLTF REQ TO CONTINUE OEX SUBMITTED FOR RULING
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY MACDONALD, NORMAN J. AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, CECILIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-11-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF JAN-04-1999, OFF CALENDAR AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, CECILIO
ORDER TO CONTINUE ORDER OF EXAMINATION HEARING TO SEPTEMBER 30, 1999, 11AM PER COMMISIONER SUE M. KAPLAN.
COPIES OF SIGNED ORDER - PER COMM. KAPLAN - AND NOTICE OF CONTINUED ORDER OF EXAMINATION, SENT TO ALL PARTIES, CREDITOR AND DEBTOR.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MACDONALD, NORMAN J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARCIA, CECILIO $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,555.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, CECILIO HEARING SET FOR JAN-04-1999 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RESET AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, CECILIO HEARING SET FOR JUN-17-1999 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
CORRESPONDENCE FROM PLTF FILED.
PLTF'S LETTER OF REQUEST TO JUDGE CHIANTELLI, PRESIDING JUDGE, FOR OEX DISPOSITION OF 15/JUL/99 BE OVERRULED AND NEW OEX COURT DATE BE ISSUED.
NOTICE LETTER: NEW OEX HEARING WILL BE SCHEDULED; UPON JUDGMENT CREDITOR'S REQUEST, BENCH LETTER MAY BE ISSUED FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR IN COURT.
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF SEP-30-1999, CONTINUED FROM SEP-30-1999 TO OCT-28-1999 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506 AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, CECILIO
